title: SACRAMENTO, CA.
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: States have the authority to implement bold and innovative solutions to ensure affordable access to essential services, like the internet.
Californians have been voicing their concerns about the rising costs of basic services, like electricity and broadband internet.
The goal should be to ensure that every single person has access to the internet and can afford it.
